Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer | DevOps Specialist

Hi, I'mChristopher Owens

Building resilient, enterprise-grade cloud systems, global edge networks, and automated CI/CD pipelines designed for high availability and security.

My background and journey

About Me

Available for work

I am a Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer and DevOps Specialist dedicated to building highly available, secure, and resilient backend systems. I focus on automation, event-driven scaling, and streamlining cloud operations to deliver rock-solid enterprise performance.

My background centers on architecting infrastructure as code (IaC), building CI/CD deployment pipelines, and securing global edge networks. I believe in designing software architecture that fails gracefully and scales dynamically.

When I am not tuning cloud networks or writing serverless configurations, I research distributed database architectures, experiment with edge computing capabilities, and contribute to open-source systems tools.

Production-grade cloud & infrastructure solutions

Flagship Case Studies

Resilient Event-Driven API Pipeline

A high-performance serverless automation engine featuring dynamic JSON parsing, automated parallel database failover routing, and multi-channel instant alerting via Slack and SMTP.

Serverless
API Pipeline
Event-Driven
SQL Failover
Slack/SMTP
JSON Parsing
CodeLive Demo

Global Edge-Deployed Frontend Gateway

A high-availability frontend node deployed across a global CDN. Incorporates automated static pre-rendering and a hardened serverless API gateway validating client payloads without exposing secrets.

Next.js
Edge Network
CDN Caching
Serverless Gateway
API Validation
Secret Shield

My professional journey

Work Experience

Senior Infrastructure & DevOps Engineer

Tech Innovations Inc. | 2021 - Present

Lead the cloud infrastructure team in designing and operating highly available, scalable AWS systems. Implemented secure CI/CD pipelines, automated Infrastructure as Code (IaC) deployment with Terraform, and engineered event-driven autoscaling mechanisms.

Site Reliability Engineer

Digital Solutions Co. | 2019 - 2021

Architected fault-tolerant serverless API gateways and edge delivery networks. Instrumented comprehensive monitoring and alerting pipelines (using Prometheus/Grafana and Slack API integration), resolving latencies and achieving 99.99% system uptime.

Systems Engineer

Creative Agency | 2017 - 2019

Designed and maintained robust backend API architectures, automated system backups, and database replication routines. Optimized relational database performance and managed Docker container deployments.

Cloud Infrastructure Intern

Startup Hub | 2016 - 2017

Assisted in containerizing legacy applications, configuring Linux server environments, and writing shell scripts to automate deployment tasks.
